Description: The antigenic base strain ID of the outbreak infection.
The rate of per-day importation for each node that the intervention is distributed to. See [example](../json/campaign-importpressure-daily-import-pressures.json).
The durations over which to apply import pressure. See [example](../json/campaign-importpressure-durations.json).

The genetic substrain ID of the outbreak infection. Together with **Antigen**, they are a unitary object representing a strain of infection, which allows for differentiation among infections. Values for **Genome** may range from -1 to 2\ :sup:`Log2_Number_of_Genomes_per_Clade-1`
The age (in days) of infected import cases.
